Knuckle Dusters  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 28
DMG: 14 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Knuckle Dusters
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2016 at 6:16 AM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Read the full thread for lots of pricing history, no-EQ lore theory-crafting, a particular itemization debates circa early 2000s...

Need confirmation in modern times:

-"You will find this item in the crypt in Old sebils off a skeletal harbringer .. its in the South West crypt room .. you'll need to go past the scarab room to get here and kill a few 50th lvl frogloks too. there is a door in the pyrmid you'll need to bring a mid 50s rogue to pick in order to get into the crypt."

-modern item window pic

-pic of someone wielding this
▲ Page top
Knuckle Dusters
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2018 at 7:04 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
snailish wrote:
Read the full thread for lots of pricing history, no-EQ lore theory-crafting, a particular itemization debates circa early 2000s...

Need confirmation in modern times:

-"You will find this item in the crypt in Old sebils off a skeletal harbringer .. its in the South West crypt room .. you'll need to go past the scarab room to get here and kill a few 50th lvl frogloks too. there is a door in the pyrmid you'll need to bring a mid 50s rogue to pick in order to get into the crypt."

-modern item window pic

-pic of someone wielding this


New item window pic added.

It dropped in a crypt group on Agnarr progression server months ago (just got to Luclin now) but I didn't get around to cleaning out some of my screenshots until today. Didn't record the NPC, but likely as it always was.

QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2003 at 3:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790912364
156 posts
Which would be best:


1.) P: Wu's Trance S: KD
2.) P: KD S: Wu's Trance
3.) P: KD S: KD
4.) P: Wu's Trance S: Wu's Trance


Thanks for your help in making my big purchase. :D
▲ Page top
RE: Anwser me this.
QuoteReply
# Nov 21 2003 at 5:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761295638
254 posts
what level is the monk they are for?if it is a 35 monk or higher the 1st suggestion is best but if it is a lower than 35 monk the 3rd or 2nd suggestion is better but personally i would buy a centi warhammer and a trance stick and have trance stick in primary and hammer in secondary and you will hit awesome
▲ Page top
RE: Anwser me this.
QuoteReply
# Nov 21 2003 at 7:23 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
This has a better ratio than Centi Warhammer, and wieghts 1/5 as much. Why would a MONK possibly want to wield a 5 weight anchor in their offhand, when they can have this.

My monk alt (lvl 25 atm) has KD and Etched steel baton (same ratio). This is an awesome combo, and one of the best you can get until the damage bonuses kick in.

I plan to keep this combo until I get near level 40, then upgrade primary to some stewart ritual claws, unless i can afford something better by then, like Zekhas katar, or similar.

Edited, Fri Nov 21 19:25:08 2003

ok i got an easy question for people that are accually smart)
I have a Goranga spiked club, and a wus stick ATM. I want to get to get a KD now this is were the question comes in. IS it a good idea to put the Wu's stick in Primary ( cause fast) and KD in secondary or should i keep it the same?

thx for all help

QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2002 at 12:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780135156
Scholar
39 posts
IMO opinion Wu's sticks are crap weapons. Sell wu's and try and get a SoS for off hand. If you can't afford SoS get KD for off hand.

# Jun 03 2002 at 2:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175339677
3 posts
I buy 2 KD for 3k
▲ Page top
KD
QuoteReply
# May 30 2002 at 12:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757755117
View User Forum
47 posts
The KD definitely has a better damage ratio. My monk had a DEX of 150 and even when the Wu's procced fairly often for me, I found that mobs died faster when I used the KD rather than the Wu's Trance Stick.

If you get a chance, pickup a no drop Goranga Spiked Club in Maiden's Eye and use that with a KD in off-hand. Awesome damage if you aren't super rich.

You can pickup a KD now for like 2K.

Edited, Thu May 30 01:02:31 2002
▲ Page top
WHICH IS BETTER!
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2002 at 8:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758417092
16 posts
wu's staff: 7/18 effect: smite

or

KD: 14/28

i want to buy one for 3K, which is better? i dont want opinions, I WANT STATS! which is proven better?

30 monk-purescale
Swords of sacrifice rules- E-marr
▲ Page top
RE: WHICH IS BETTER!
QuoteReply
# May 11 2002 at 1:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755576113
33 posts
Depends... If you want an offhand weapon KD... the proc is fairly rare on the Wustaff and it hits too fast for an offhand in my opinion. if you get on a mob with a DS you'll beat yourself to death.

Primary Wu is better. Lower Delay in late game means more times DMG bonus is added. I would however suggest a Jade mace as it is just plain better if you have the cash. and Aggro is lower in case you do proc with Wu staff
▲ Page top
4K for KD is not normal
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2002 at 2:13 AM Rating: Decent

3 posts
its way too high price for its class specific and zero stats additions. well i know that centi longsword dont fit monk but come to think of it its 14 27 with 8str and only for 2K its way better. i hope they lower this one for 1K or 1500 even.

▲ Page top
RE: heh
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2001 at 4:01 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361712791
1 post
Faction isn't even that hard to raise. I'm an Iksar Monk and went to Crush Bone at lvl 6, (not realziing that FoB was WAY better), and by the time I was lvl 10 I wasn't kos to Kelethin, Felwithe, or Kaladim. Then I went to Qeynos and made un-kos there by the time I was 15. Iksars can Forage for there food so you dont need to buy any, and as a Monk there is no need to Bank anyways seeing as how we can only keep Gold and Plat, which people will trade gold for plat almost always.
Everyone thinks Iksar are so hard to be, and they are a bit harder but when you get FD, kos is hardly a problem. I can Bank in NFP by running to the bank from the sewers and FDing in the bank, before the guards catch up.
I just dont see how a Human can "Chuckle" or whatever at an Iksar because the human took the easy way...

Zatrek 32 Iksar monk, Mith Marr

Edited, Thu Dec 20 16:03:56 2001
